overview.description: Computer vision AI solutions for smart cities, retail, healthcare, and transportation
overview.description_long: Iterait builds and delivers complex computer vision AI solutions since 2018. Their flagship product City Sense provides AI-powered parking enforcement using edge AI kits mounted on hybrid vehicles with real-time ALPR (Automated License Plate Recognition). Additional products include Vividi (retail analytics), IsletNet (diabetes AI for IKEM hospital), IVF AI, and Hear-o (audio AI). They hold a 4-year contract with Prague to monitor 174,000+ parking spaces.
overview.tagline: Transforming scientific work into genuine artificial intelligence solutions

history.origin_story: Founded in Prague in 2018 by three co-founders to transform scientific computer vision research into practical AI solutions for industry.

key_milestones.event: IsletNet won 'Idea of the Year' in international healthcare AI competition
Signed 4-year contract with City of Prague for parking enforcement using City Sense

awards: Idea of the Year 2020 (IsletNet — international healthcare AI competition)
partnerships: IKEM (Institute for Clinical and Experimental Medicine)

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Core products (City Sense, IsletNet) are deeply embedded in physical infrastructure and regulated healthcare domains. City Sense requires custom edge AI hardware deployments on vehicles; IsletNet is co-developed with IKEM hospital. Foundation models cannot easily displace these hardware-dependent, compliance-driven deployments.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Smart city parking enforcement and healthcare imaging are real, funded markets, but they are niche and competitive. Revenue appears dependent on winning public sector contracts; international expansion (Poland, Italy) is underway but unproven.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Small team (~11 people) with no disclosed external funding. However, the 4-year Prague contract provides meaningful revenue stability. Bootstrapped or grant-funded model limits growth capital but reduces dependency on investor cycles.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Iterait has real contracts and hardware-embedded products that resist AGI commoditization, but its small size, bootstrapped status, and reliance on public sector contract wins creates meaningful execution and scaling risk.

metadata.notes: Company website fully accessible. 11 team members listed on about page (small efficient team). VAT: CZ07405821. Main product City Sense has 4-year contract with Prague since Sept 2022. Vividi (vividi.io) is a separate product spinout. No CNAIP URL available. No Glassdoor data found in search snippets.
